## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change (existing functionality changes behavior)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / tooling / chore

## How this was tested

<!-- What you actually ran, not just what exists. -->

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes (`pytest --cov=backend --cov-report=term-missing`)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (frontend)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (frontend, includes `tsc --strict`)
- [ ] Manually verified in a browser (for UI changes) — describe what you clicked through
- [ ] Added/updated tests covering this change
